title: 'Spoiled narcissist': Taylor Swift faces online criticism about Joe Alwyn
description: A viral social media post criticizing Taylor Swift has sparked debate online, referencing her past relationship with Joe Alwyn and mentioning Travis Kelce. The post accuses Swift of belittling Alwyn’s struggles and mocks her current relationship. While the comments spread quickly online, they reflect one user’s opinion rather than verified claims about the singer.

description: Two college friends, aged 18 and 20, were found dead in a temple washroom in Surat after allegedly injecting themselves with anesthetic drugs. Police discovered drug vials and syringes, along with mobile phone data indicating searches for suicide methods. The girls had left for college and did not return home.

title: Bengaluru woman ends life after argument with husband over sambar
description: A 25-year-old homemaker in Bengaluru died by suicide after consuming a grain-preserving tablet following a dispute with her husband over serving leftover sambar. The argument escalated when the husband scolded her for not preparing fresh food on the third day of serving the same dish. Her father has requested a police investigation into the circumstances.
